settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: configure forgeax · plugins · keys · account
settings.noSectionsHint2: useSettingsSection({ id, label, node }) — mount one anywhere to add it.

language.label: Language
language.description: Interface language. English is the source; other languages are a translation overlay.

env.saved: Wrote {{count}} variable(s) to .env (takes effect after restarting the stack)

apiKeys.llmHint: forgeax/.env; takes effect after restarting the stack
apiKeys.multimodalHint: image-gen / video-gen / multimodal proxy · used by plugins like wb-character

models.title: Model
models.hint: Change FORGEAX_MODEL (takes effect after restarting the stack)
models.helpPrefix: All LLM credentials are read from
models.helpAdapter: ; the adapter is auto-selected by model id pattern
models.helpProxySuffix: is set, everything goes through the proxy.

modelLab.hint: One-off model testing · tune temperature / top_p / max_tokens · via /api/llm/test → lib/llm-gateway → LiteLLM proxy
modelLab.modelsLabel: Models — select models to test in parallel ({{count}} selected)
modelLab.exportCsvTitle: Export current results as CSV (also copied to clipboard)
modelLab.allFiltered: All rows filtered out by "Hide unavailable".

cliProviders.hint: Multiple CLI backends — agents are routed by marketplace/manifest.json#agents[].provider
cliProviders.none: No registered providers — check the server startup logs.

workspace.resetSessionsHint: Clear team/sessions/* — keeps agent config / marketplace / games
workspace.resetSessionsDone: Deleted {{count}} session directories, created a new empty session
workspace.resetGamesHint: Delete all user-created games (real directories under .forgeax/games/) — keeps the official examples in packages/games
workspace.resetGamesHelp: Only deletes the real directories under .forgeax/games/ (games you created); symlinked official examples (cow-survivor / fps etc.) are kept as-is. This cannot be undone.
workspace.resetGamesConfirm:
Delete all games you created? Official examples (cow-survivor/fps etc.) are kept.

This deletes the real directories under .forgeax/games/ (games you created); symlinked official examples are untouched. This cannot be undone.

account.title: Account
account.intro: The cloud account system is still being planned. The local forgeax-studio works fully offline; cloud features will unlock later:
account.feature2: Cloud model gateway · shared LLM key pool

about.versionSchemeDetail: — 0 = pre-1.0 epoch · M.D = month.day of latest main commit · N = cumulative main commits.

changelog.hint: Version iteration log · sourced from CHANGELOG.md
changelog.empty: CHANGELOG.md has no version sections yet.

shortcuts.title: Keyboard shortcuts
shortcuts.introBlenderSuffix: combos — avoiding browser Ctrl+1/2/3 tab switching / Ctrl+J downloads / Ctrl+B bookmarks bar.
shortcuts.introImeSuffix: or keyCode 229 is auto-skipped; also doesn't fire while focused on input/textarea/editable elements (Esc / Ctrl+/ are exceptions).
shortcuts.introReadonlySuffix: display; customization will open up later.

usage.title: Usage
usage.hint: Aggregated from ledger hook:assistantMessage events · local sessions only
usage.noData: No usage data yet — the assistant hasn't returned any tokens.

agents.hint: Unchecked agents won't show in the main agent avatar row / delegate tool
agents.summarySuffix: · once uninstalled they're hidden from the main agent avatar row / delegate tool list; agents already instantiated in the session tree are unaffected.

drawer.title: System Settings
drawer.apiKeysHint: Takes effect after restarting the stack (FORGEAX_PROJECT_ROOT=forgeax bash run.sh)
drawer.anthropicKeyPlaceholder: sk-ant-... or Azure Cognitive Services key
drawer.modelHint: Change FORGEAX_MODEL (takes effect after restarting the stack)
drawer.modelHelpPrefix: All LLM credentials are read from
drawer.modelHelpAdapter: ; the adapter is auto-selected by model id pattern.
drawer.modelHelpProxySuffix: is set, everything goes through the proxy.
drawer.cliProvidersHint: Multiple CLI backends — agents are routed by marketplace/manifest.json#agents[].provider
drawer.cliProvidersNone: No registered providers — check the server startup logs.
drawer.resetSessionsHint: Clear .forgeax/.../team/sessions/* — keeps agent config / marketplace / games
drawer.resetSessionsHelp: For a clean restart when chat is stuck / state is confused; the next message creates a fresh main session.
drawer.resetSessionsConfirm:
Clear all sessions (including sub-agent history)?

This deletes the entire .forgeax/.../team/sessions/* directory.
The next chat will auto-create a new main agent session; agent config / marketplace / games are kept.
drawer.enterNewKeyHint: Enter a new key above, then save

bus.title: Bus Plugin Overview
bus.searchPlaceholder: Search by id / name (e.g. wb-anim / character)…
bus.requestFailed: Request failed: {{err}} · check whether /api/bus/plugins is reachable
bus.emptyNoPlugins: Bus loaded no plugins — check the marketplace scan path
bus.emptyNoMatch: No match — check the search term or reset the filter
bus.rowKbdTitle: ↑↓ / Home / End row keyboard navigation · Enter / Space to expand
bus.rowKbdLabel: Row keyboard navigation · {{n}} rows · Enter to expand
bus.footnoteBroken: broken[] field not yet exposed by server (P3 work)
bus.footnoteRowHint: click row / ↑↓ switch row / Enter to expand details
bus.kindTagFlashTitle: Click: flash the {{kind}} pill in the left BUS KINDS list (P3.38 reverse-echo channel)
bus.versionThSub: 0.0.x = manifest placeholder (matches the phase3.0 wb-* placeholder batch) · 0.1+ = a real bumped version (the P4.62/P4.63 purple pill + row tint both map to this boundary)
bus.rowTitleCollapse: Click to collapse · ↑↓ switch row · Enter to collapse
bus.rowTitleExpand: Click to expand details · ↑↓ switch row · Enter to expand
bus.verBumpedTitle: manifest v{{ver}} bumped · the 0.0.x placeholder semantics have been bumped · this is a real version
bus.manifestCopyTitle: Click to copy path to clipboard · paste into a terminal or editor to jump straight to manifest.json
bus.detailKindSoloTitle: Click to show only {{kind}} plugins · use the ✕ button in the top filter row to clear filtering
bus.versionCopyTitle: Click to copy version · paste into a changelog / shell / commit message
bus.uiFrontendTitle: entry.frontend · this plugin's React panel source (relative to the plugin dir) · dynamically imported by the Sidebar via PLUGIN_PANEL_LOADERS when the workbench tab is opened
bus.backlinkAgentTitle: Highlight the card matching {{id}} in the Sidebar AGENTS section
bus.backlinkWbTitle: Switch back to Workbench and open the wb:{{wbId}} tab
bus.backlinkKindTitle: Flash the {{kind}} pill in the Sidebar BUS KINDS footer for 1.5s — peripheral confirmation of this plugin's kind at the chrome edge
bus.detailNoteBroken: broken[] field not yet exposed by server — pending P3 work
bus.tallyCliTitle: This plugin is registered as a cliProvider (1 = yes / 0 = no)
bus.tallySkillTitle: Number of skills this plugin registers with the Bus (Bus.skills[])
bus.tallyToolTitle: Number of tools this plugin registers with the Bus (Bus.tools[])
bus.tallyEventTitle: Number of event schemas this plugin registers with the Bus (Bus.events[])
bus.provTallyEmptyTitle: This plugin exposes no cliProvider/skill/tool/event to the Bus — usually a kind=workbench pure-frontend plugin (the panel runs on its own)
bus.provTallyTitle: This plugin provides {{n}} provider entries to the Bus (cli+skill+tool+event total)
bus.provAiFlagTitle: exposedToAI=true · directly callable by AI agents
bus.kindDescWorkbench: Left TOOLS row + main panel entry (11 creation kinds + admin + code)
bus.kindDescAgent: Personas summonable via sub-agent routing (cc-coder family, etc.)
bus.kindDescCliProvider: CLI runner adapters (claude-code / codex / cursor-agent / forgeax)
bus.kindDescModelBinding: text/multimodal channel vendor bindings (anthropic-text / openai, etc.)
bus.kindDescTool: pure tools (balance:resim, etc.) — no UI / agent

composer.cliButtonOverrideDown: ⚠ {{provider}} is currently unavailable — pick 'forgeax' or another healthy provider, or turns will error.
composer.cliButtonForgeaxNative: Provider — forgeax (native · sends messages directly to Session/EventBus)
composer.queueSub: Sent in order after the current reply finishes
composer.queueEditTitle: Edit — pull back into the input box
composer.queueSendNowStreamingTitle: Send now — interrupt the current reply and handle this one first
composer.placeholderStreaming: Reply in progress — you can keep typing; [Enter] queues it, sent in order after the current reply finishes
composer.mentionAgentTitle: Mention agent ({{count}}) — click to insert @<agent> into the input box
composer.agentItemInBusTitle: {{name}} · {{role}} · also on the bus host — click to insert @{{id}}
composer.atFoot: ↑↓ navigate · ⏎ insert @<id> · → go to Bus details · Esc close
composer.busSkillsTitle: Bus skills ({{count}}) — click to pick a trigger command and insert it into the input box
composer.slashFoot: ↑↓ navigate · ⏎ insert trigger · → go to Bus details · Esc close
composer.modelDisabledProvider: Currently routing via the {{provider}} channel; that provider decides its own model. Switch to the forgeax or claude-code channel to edit agent.json::models.model
composer.modelDisabledNoAgent: No agent selected yet — cannot read agent.json
composer.cliDescClaudeCode: Anthropic the reference agent CLI CLI
composer.cliDescCodebuddy: a peer agent CLI Code CLI
composer.cliBusPillTitle: bus plugin: {{plugin}} · click to view in Bus details →
composer.interruptTitle: Interrupt the current reply and send now (steer)
composer.queueSendTitle: Queue send — runs in order after the current reply finishes ([Enter])
composer.stopTitle: Stop the current reply (does not affect queued messages)
composer.sendNoSession: Session is still loading — wait a second; if it stays stuck, check whether the server (bottom-right) is down
composer.sendNoAgent: No agent selected yet — wait for the AgentSwitcher list to load (usually <1s), or manually click an agent avatar above

reference.chip_hint: Click chip to remove / hover for details
reference.workspace_context_hint: Right-click to rename or delete this workspace

workbench.editorPlaceholder:
// Click a produced file under an Agents card on the left → its content shows here live.
// e.g. Iori's card-roguelike_pillar.md / Suzu's *_design.md.
workbench.resizeBottomPanelTitle: Drag to resize the bottom panel
workbench.ledgerEmpty: No activity yet — it appears here after Forge sends Iori/Suzu to set up pillars and write designs
workbench.consoleEmpty: No console output yet — the game's console.log/warn/error shows here live
workbench.networkEmpty: No network requests yet — the game's fetch / XHR / WebSocket shows here live
workbench.gallerySub: Pick a workbench to start — click a tile to switch to its wb-* tab in the Sidebar
workbench.bumpedStatsSuffix: bumped (manifest version is not a 0.0.x placeholder)
workbench.bumpedPastPlaceholder: already bumped past the 0.0.x placeholder semantics
workbench.verTagBumped: already bumped · in development (not a 0.0.x placeholder)
workbench.verTagPlaceholder: placeholder semantic version · will bump when implemented
workbench.wipTagTitle: experimental — manifest marks experimental:true · real implementation pending Phase 4+
workbench.toolsExposedToAi: exposed to AI by this workbench plugin
workbench.agentsEmpty: No agents yet — Forge dispatches team members automatically after you send a message
workbench.agentDisabledTitle: disabled in Settings (not included in collaboration/dispatch)
workbench.agentDetailTitle: click to open Agent detail (products / long-term memory / Skills)
workbench.subagentsHint: {n} sub-specialists below · talk to the lead (click to view Persona only)
workbench.skinGroupHint: Affects chat tone only · click to switch skin · double-click to edit Persona
workbench.providerCodersHint: {n} CLI drivers below · click to switch driver + open Persona editor

gameSwitcher.activateFailedBody: Preview switched to {{slug}}, but server-side activation failed ({{message}}). The agent's working directory and outputs may still point at the old game — you can retry or refresh.
gameSwitcher.deleteConfirm: Delete games/{{slug}}/ ? This action cannot be undone.
gameSwitcher.newGameTooltip: Create a new .forgeax/games/<slug>/ under the current workspace (Iori/Suzu design + Forge writes code)
gameSwitcher.empty: No games yet · click + above to create
gameSwitcher.slugError: slug: 2-41 chars / lowercase ASCII / digits / hyphens
gameSwitcher.kickoffMessage: Just created games/{{slug}}/, brief: {{brief}}. Please run the full pipeline: Iori → Suzu → you write the code.
gameSwitcher.briefLabel: brief (optional — leave one and Forge dispatches Iori immediately)
gameSwitcher.briefPlaceholder: e.g. 2D card roguelike, 5-10 min per run, build a deck for satisfying blowout damage

rewind.noFileChanges: No file changes after this — only the conversation will be reverted.
rewind.confirmHint: You can restore with one click after rewinding; it locks in once you send a new message.
rewind.inlinePlaceholder: Edit and press Enter to send · restart from here

sidebar.popOutToSeparateWindow: Pop out to a separate window
sidebar.providesNoTools: This plugin exposes no tools to the AI agent
sidebar.providesNoEvents: This plugin emits no events on the bus

sidebar.openInBusTooltip: Switch to the Bus tab (⌘3) and auto-expand the {{id}} detail row

import.title: Import .fxpack
import.hint: Local absolute path — binary upload from the browser is not yet supported

inspect.help: ADR-0014 default-deny · unsigned packs cannot install before confirmation. Inspect does not write to disk; it only reads the manifest and permissions.

permissions.title: Permission declaration
permissions.hint: manifest.permissions[] · trusted by the host after install; runtime enforcement will land in a later version
permissions.none: No permissions declared — this pack will not actively access fs / net.

conflicts.title: Conflicts
conflicts.entry: already at {{layer}} v{{oldVersion}} → new pack v{{newVersion}}

install.title: Install
install.unsignedAck: I understand this pack is unsigned and I take responsibility for its source

fork.title: Fork plugin
fork.hint: Copy an existing plugin to L1/L2, then chat-driven vibe-edit
fork.doneHelp: Auto-reloaded — the new version should appear in the sidebar.
fork.note: Fork only copies the source directory (incl. prompt / handlers / config). manifest.id is rewritten, displayName gets a "(mine)" suffix. L1 has higher priority than L0; the fork immediately replaces the original in the sidebar.

record.title: Record as skill
record.hint: Abstract the last N ledger events into a skill — backend is ready, UI goes through the chat flow
record.backendMid: is implemented (deterministic + LLM-distillation modes), but a ledger event subset must be selected
record.backendMid2: — this step is currently driven by the
record.backendPost: in the main chat box to start the recording flow.

theme.title: Theme
theme.hint: Boot animation style · applies on refresh

copy.hint: Title / subtitle — leave empty to restore defaults

Remove "{{name}}" from the known list?

projectSwitcher.deleteProjectConfirm: Delete project {{id}}/ ? This deletes the entire working directory (games + .forgeax).

sessionSwitcher.deleteConfirm:
Delete this session?
The session directory and ledger on the server will be removed together.
sessionSwitcher.newSessionTitle: Create a new session (POST /api/sessions · scheduler auto-starts)

openFile.notInWorkspace:
Cannot open "{path}"

This file is not in the editable workspace (usually read-only source from the engine / dependency libraries that the agent merely read).
Studio can only open files under .forgeax/games/** and packages/**.
openFile.notFound:
File does not exist: "{path}"

It may have been moved / renamed / deleted, or this game's entry file is actually named differently (e.g. main.ts instead of index.ts).

loop.started: 🔁 Long-running task `{daemonId}` started · runs every {intervalSec}s · view progress + screenshot wall in Dashboard → Agents Hub · view per-tick history in this ChatPanel

store.noAgentSelected: ⚠ No agent selected yet — wait for the AgentSwitcher list to load (usually <1s), or manually click an agent avatar above.

package.title: Package as standalone game
package.noGame: Select or create a game before packaging.
package.webgpuHint: WebGPU requires opening over localhost or HTTPS.
package.rebuildEngineHint: Developer mode: rebuild Rust→WASM engine core (wgpu-wasm)
package.cleanBody: This will delete the following local packaging environment (irreversible; it is rebuilt automatically on the next packaging run):
package.cleanKeepHint: Export products and packaging history are NOT deleted.
package.cleanPartial: Partially cleaned (some items failed to delete)
package.cleaningHint: Removing the isolated toolchain and caches, please wait (may take a few to a dozen seconds for large dirs).

android.title: Export Android Studio Project
android.subtitle: Generates an offline-openable Android Studio project (WebView shell + full game) that you open to integrate SDKs and build an APK/AAB.
android.appIdHint: e.g. com.acme.mygame — at least two segments, each starting with a letter.
android.projectNameHint: Used as the Android project folder name and Gradle rootProject.name.
android.orientationHint: The exported app launches locked to the selected orientation.
android.iconErrType: Icon must be a PNG image

agentSwitcher.titleAgent: {{id}} ({{role}}) · click = switch to main chat target · double-click = send next message in this thread to it

editorPanel.unavailableDesc: Editor runtime not started or missing engine wasm artifacts. Nested Studio page has been blocked.

shortcuts.gameFullscreen: Game fullscreen · hide only Studio's own TopBar / Sidebar / ChatPanel / StatusBar (browser frame stays)
shortcuts.browserFullscreen: Browser fullscreen (presentation style) · native browser fullscreen API (tab bar / address bar disappear too)
shortcuts.closeOverlay: Close current overlay · browser fullscreen → game fullscreen → Settings → Dashboard in order

centerPlugin.redockTitle: Redock the standalone window into the main window

errorBoundary.panelHint: You can retry / reload this region without restarting the whole Studio.
errorBoundary.fullscreenHint: The React UI threw while rendering. Try "Retry" first; if that fails, "Reload this region"; if it still errors, "Reload Studio". The desktop app has no address bar, so you must recover with the buttons below.

infoPanel.emptyNoMessages: No messages yet. Errors from Play / Edit / plugins / shell will appear here.
infoPanel.emptyNoMatch: No entries match the current filter.

dockShell.popoutToWindow: Pop out to a separate OS window

firstRun.errMissingKey: Please enter your OpenRouter API Key
firstRun.title: 👋 Welcome to ForgeaX Studio
firstRun.lead: Just tell Forge "make a game about XX" and it will plan, write code, and run it live on the right. To start, pick how Forge reaches a model:
firstRun.opt1DescAfter: (sk-or-…) and paste it here. It is only written to the local ~/ForgeaxProjects/.env and never uploaded anywhere.
firstRun.opt2Desc: claude-code / codex / cursor — once you `login` in that CLI, just switch provider at the bottom-left of the chat box. No key needed here.
firstRun.step2LeadAfter: (format sk-or-…). OpenRouter bills against your account balance.
firstRun.advanced: Advanced (proxy URL, usually no need to change)

fsBrowser.initWorkspaceWhenNoGame: Initialize default workspace when no game exists
